description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a prominent gable roof covered in dark gray shingles and two stone chimneys. The exterior features a mix of light beige siding and white paneling, with a stone foundation visible at the base. Large, vertically oriented windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes a spacious covered patio area with a tiled floor, partially enclosed by slatted wooden panels for privacy. The main entryway is marked by a modern door with glass inserts and is flanked by tall, narrow windows. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, large vertical windows, and a mix of beige siding and white paneling. Features include a covered patio, stone chimneys, and a contemporary entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the house, highlighting the large windows, stone chimneys, and the covered patio area with tiled flooring.
description_view_1: This top-down view emphasizes the expansive dark gable roof and the two stone chimneys, with the covered patio and open area beneath the roof visible below.
description_view_2: This view presents the opposite side and main entryway, showcasing the modern door, tall windows, and the transition between beige siding and white paneling.
description_view_3: This direct front view centers on the main entryway, flanked by tall, narrow windows and a clean, minimal facade with a stone foundation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Modern door with glass inserts, flanked by tall windows, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean lines
